docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
• mkdocs new [dir-name] - Create a new project.
  • mkdocs serve - Start the live-reloading docs server.
  • mkdocs build - Build the documentation site.
  • mkdocs -h - Print help message and exit.

docs.title: Project layout
docs.text:
mkdocs.yml    # The configuration file.
docs/
    index.md  # The documentation homepage.
    ...       # Other markdown pages, images and other files.

docs.title: values_between(column_name, min, max)
docs.text:
Check if values are within the provided range (inclusive of both boundaries)

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default column_name str

Name of column to check

required min int

Minimum limit

required max int

Maximum limit

required

Returns:

Type Description bool

True or False

docs.title: values_greater_than(column_name, limit)
docs.text:
Check if values are greater than the provided limit

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default column_name str

Name of column to check

required limit int

Limit value

required

Returns:

Type Description bool

True or False

docs.title: values_in_set(column_name, set_)
docs.text:
Check if values are in the provided set

Parameters:

Name Type Description Default column_name str

Name of column to check

required set_ set[str | int | float]

Set of allowed values

required

Returns:

Type Description bool

True or False

docs.title: Quality Rules
docs.text: Rule Description Arguments values_of_type Check if values are of the proveded type column_name: column name to checktype: data type values_unique Check if values are unique column_name: column name to check values_between Check if values are within the provided range (inclusive of both boundaries) column_name: column name to checkminmax values_not_greater_than Check if values are not greater than the provided limit column_name: column name to checklimit: limit value values_not_less_than Check if values are not less than the provided limit column_name: column name to checklimit: limit value values_in_set Check if values are in the provided set column_name: column name to checkset_: set of allowed values values_not_null Check if values are are not null column_name: column name to check

docs.title: Supported Formats
docs.text: Many data formats can be converted to PyArrow tables.

docs.title: Modin
docs.text:
import pyarrow as pa
from modin.pandas.io import to_pandas

table = pa.Table.from_pandas(to_pandas(df))
